about.title: About me
about.p1: Student in Common Core at 42 Paris, driven by curiosity and a deep passion for building things that live on screens.
about.p2: I build modern web and mobile apps, from fast MVPs to scalable products. Freelance since 2024, passionate about AI, SaaS and clean code.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm probably learning something new, tinkering on a side project, or diving into the latest tech.

contact.title: Conversation comes first
contact.subtitle: That's often where good things begin.
